abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3de42d2d3cb78855]{Sojourn} and score a weak hit or miss, you may claim the rights of hospitality warranted by your title or lineage. If you do, roll all dice again and add +1. On a miss, you are refused, and your presumption causes significant new trouble.
When you exert your title or lineage to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you forgo your title or lineage and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} as an equal, or when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} to serve someone of a lower station, add +1 and take +1 momentum or +1 spirit on a hit.
